paper_reproduction.reason: Shared-agent configuration differs from original HOODIE paper; per-EA is new architecture

exact_numerical_reproduction.reason: Different simulator, state representation, training procedure; no reproduction claim

performance_superiority.reason: Shared-agent underperforms oracle (-0.27 pp); per-EA underperforms both shared and oracle (-3.31 and -3.58 pp)

baseline_superiority.reason: Results presented as-is without superiority framing; honest comparison only

proposed_method_implementation.reason: Fully out of scope for baseline report; pending user approval

shared_agent_campaign.description: Single DDQN trainer with shared online/target networks

per_ea_distributed_campaign.description: 20 independent DDQN trainers, each with own online/target networks, optimizer, replay buffer, epsilon schedule, target-sync

what_was_not_done.hyperparameter_sweeps: Not run (lr/gamma sweep, system parameter sweep)

honest_statements: Shared-agent learned local-dominant strategy, improving modestly over fixed_local but not exceeding oracle
Per-EA distributed learned different final policy (100% vertical) than shared-agent, enabling per-EA autonomy
Per-EA distributed underperformed both shared-agent (-3.31 pp) and oracle (-3.58 pp) on completion
No superiority claim made; results are baseline outputs as-is
Figure 10 complete; Figures 8, 9, 11 partial (single-config only; sweeps/ablations not run)
final_verdict: Baseline simulations complete, metrics reconciled, claim safety passed. Ready for objective external review with honest representation of what was/wasn't done.
